'''Eponte Spaceport''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] and main [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] of [[Kabaira]] in the [[Teilcam system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. [[Drayhar's Cantina]] was located in the spaceport.<ref name="Passages" />

{{Loc-stub}}
